Metadata.title: {name}'s Portfolio
Metadata.description: Personal portfolio of a Web Developer.

Hero.description: I build efficient, scalable, and user-friendly web applications. From task management systems to government procurement platforms, I turn complex requirements into elegant digital solutions.

About.title: About Me
About.p1: Information Engineering undergraduate at Semarang University (2025) with experience as a Web Developer through the Ministry of Manpower's MagangHub program at PT Environesia Global Saraya (Nov 2025 – May 2026).
About.p2: During my studies, I was also involved in the MBKM program and various application development projects, including a procurement system for a government agency.
About.p3: I have built end-to-end applications like the CBDMS Workspace, a task management system with an interactive Kanban board, task dependencies, multi-tenancy, and a real-time dashboard using Firestore.
About.p4: I actively use AI as a development partner, a style I call 'Vibe Coding'. For me, AI is not just a tool for writing code faster. I use it to explore various architectural solutions, analyze complex problems from different angles, and automate repetitive tasks. This approach allows me to focus more on high-level strategic thinking and building user-centric features, ultimately speeding up the development cycle while maintaining high code quality.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.description: A selection of projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills and expertise.

cbdms.title: CBDMS Workspace
cbdms.description: A web-based task management system with an interactive Kanban board, task dependencies, and a real-time dashboard.

modal.title: Feature Details: CBDMS Workspace
modal.description: A comprehensive project management and team collaboration platform, designed to streamline workflows, boost productivity, and provide full visibility on all tasks.

highlights.title: End-to-End Interactive Project Management System
points: Developed a fully interactive drag-and-drop Kanban board for real-time workflow visualization.
Implemented a complex task dependency system (waiting, blocking, related) to ensure an organized workflow.
Built a hierarchical task structure with support for individually assignable sub-tasks, complete with dynamic revision checklists.

highlights.title: Real-time Admin Dashboard with Dynamic Data Visualization
points: Designed an interactive admin dashboard using Tabs for data segmentation by job type (Tasks, Social Media, Web).
All dashboard components are connected in real-time to Firestore and update automatically based on filters.
Equipped with a 'Live' indicator for visual confirmation that the displayed data is live from the server.

highlights.title: Full Automation & Integration with Instagram Graph API
points: Built a secure OAuth 2.0 authentication flow to connect Instagram Business accounts.
Implemented a scheduled auto-posting feature that automatically publishes content (images and Reels).
Provided a page for synchronizing and displaying published posts directly from Instagram.

highlights.title: Multi-tenancy Architecture with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
points: Designed a multi-tenant system where each company's data is securely isolated.
Implemented a granular permission system for various roles, configurable via the admin panel.
Added an 'Emergency Admin' feature allowing Super Admins to grant temporary access rights.

highlights.title: AI-Powered Productivity Features with Genkit
points: Smart Task Suggestions: Analyzes historical task data to provide recommendations for subsequent tasks.
AI Priority Guard: Provides smart validation when a user attempts to raise a task's priority to prevent 'priority inflation'.

all_features.title: Project Management
points: Three views: Kanban Board, Task List (with filtering & sorting), and Schedule Calendar.
Comprehensive Task Details: Description, sub-tasks, dependencies, activity history, and comment section with @mention feature.
File Management: Upload local files or link from Google Drive.

all_features.title: Social Media & Web Content Modules
points: Content Planning via Kanban Board and Calendar.
Automated Publishing for Instagram (including Reels).
Analytics Dashboard to monitor content performance.
Rich text (WYSIWYG) content editor.

all_features.title: User Management & Security
points: Full CRUD features for user accounts.
Roles & Permissions System: Admin panel to configure access rights for each role.
Secure login process, password reset, and custom token claims.

all_features.title: Settings & Customization
points: Change company name, logo, and basic information.
Brand/Client Management.
Workflow Customization with a drag-and-drop interface.
Navigation Editor: Full customization of the sidebar menu for each user role.

all_features.title: Additional Utilities & Productivity
points: Maintenance Mode.
Real-time in-app notifications.
Daily Checklist for routine tasks.
Time Tracking on each task.
Link Sharing with password protection and expiration dates.

lsp.title: WordPress Site for LSP
lsp.description: Contributed to the development of a WordPress site using Elementor, focusing on data entry and implementing minor features from a template.

modal.title: LSP Website Development
modal.description: Contributed to the development of the official website for the Environmental Study Center (LSP) using WordPress and Elementor.

highlights.title: Content and Feature Implementation
points: Responsible for data entry for training program codes and descriptions.
Added minor interactive features using pre-built Elementor templates.
Assisted in managing and updating site content as requested.

crm.title: CRM & WhatsApp Integration
crm.description: Built a proof-of-concept CRM integrated with WAHA (WhatsApp HTTP API) to monitor sales agent chats, leveraging an existing N8N workflow.

modal.title: PoC: CRM with WhatsApp Integration
modal.description: A proof-of-concept project designed to give sales managers visibility into their team's WhatsApp conversations. While the project was not continued due to a shift in business strategy, it successfully demonstrated the technical integration capabilities.

highlights.title: System Integration and Development
points: Built a web-based CRM from the ground up to serve as the monitoring interface.
Integrated the CRM with the WAHA (WhatsApp HTTP API) to fetch and display chat data.
Adapted and continued an existing N8N automation workflow to process the incoming data.
Collaborated on the database structure using Supabase to store chat information.

hrp.title: HRP (Environesia Career)
hrp.description: An end-to-end recruitment and HR management platform with AI-powered candidate analysis and a dynamic approval system.

modal.title: Feature Details: HRP Starter Kit
modal.description: A solid, modular, and extensible Human Resource Planning (HRP) platform. Each feature is designed to be interconnected, supporting the HR process from end to end.

highlights.title: Intelligent End-to-End Recruitment Workflow
points: Manages the entire recruitment lifecycle, from job posting, candidate application, testing, interviews, to employee activation.
AI-Powered Candidate Analysis: The system 'reads' CVs and provides a match score and automated interview question recommendations.

highlights.title: Role & Type-Based Employee Management
points: Different dashboards and workflows for Permanent Employees, Probationary (Training) Employees, and Interns.
Specialized features like daily reports and monthly evaluations to support a structured internship program.

highlights.title: Dynamic Multi-Level Approval System
points: Automated approval flows for Overtime and Leave requests: Employee -> Division Manager -> HRD.
Smart routing: If a Manager submits a request for themselves, the system automatically routes it to HRD, bypassing the manager-level approval.

highlights.title: Robust Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Architecture
points: Each user (Super Admin, HRD, Manager, Employee, Candidate) gets a tailored view and access based on their responsibilities.
Dynamically configured through menu settings and strict security rules.

all_features.title: Career & Candidate Portal
points: Public-facing page to display all active job vacancies.
Multi-step application process: profile, document uploads, and job application.
Personal candidate dashboard to track application status and schedules.

all_features.title: Recruitment Management (HRD/Admin)
points: Vacancy management (Draft, Published, Closed).
Candidate application management (Screening, Interview, Hired, etc.).
Interview scheduling and job offer delivery.

all_features.title: Employee Management
points: Centralized database to manage profiles of all employee types.
Onboarding via invitation batches with quotas for mass recruitment.
Daily attendance management with location-based (GPS) validation.

all_features.title: Requests & Approvals
points: Dynamic forms for submitting overtime and leave requests (sick, personal, etc.) with attachment uploads.
Dedicated dashboards for Managers and HRD to review and approve/reject requests.

all_features.title: Internship-Specific Features
points: Daily report forms for interns (activities, learnings, challenges).
Report summaries to view all submitted reports.
Monthly evaluation and feedback feature from mentors or HRD.

all_features.title: Administration & Settings
points: User and role management (HRD, Manager, etc.).
Company master data (Brands, Divisions).
Navigation menu customization for each user role.

Skills.title: Skills & Expertise
Skills.description: The technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life.

Approach.title: My Working Approach
Approach.description: My approach to every project ensures high-quality, efficient results.
Approach.p1: I focus not just on coding, but on how the system addresses real-world user needs.
Approach.p2: I build applications with a structured approach, considering efficiency, usability, and scalability.

Contact.title: Get In Touch
Contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, collaborations, or employment opportunities. Feel free to reach out.
